```cpp
#pragma once

#include <optional>
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <vector>
#include <string>

namespace query_active_users_posts {

struct User {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> user_id;
  std::string username;
};

struct Post {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> post_id;
  int user_id;
  sqlgen::DateTime created_at;
};

struct ActiveUser {
  static constexpr const char* tablename = "ActiveUserView";
  static constexpr bool is_view = true;
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> user_id;
  std::string username;
};

std::vector<ActiveUser> query_active_users_posts() {
    using namespace sqlgen::literals;

    // Connect to the database
    auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::connect("test_db.sqlite");

    // Create tables if they don't exist
    (sqlgen::create_table<User> | sqlgen::if_not_exists)(conn);
    (sqlgen::create_table<Post> | sqlgen::if_not_exists)(conn);

    // Build the query
    auto query = sqlgen::select_from<User, "t1">("user_id"_t1, "username"_t1)
                 | sqlgen::inner_join<Post, "t2">("user_id"_t1 == "user_id"_t2)
                 | sqlgen::where("created_at"_t2 >= "2025-12-01 00:00:00" && 
                                "created_at"_t2 <= "2025-12-31 23:59:59")
                 | sqlgen::distinct
                 | sqlgen::to<std::vector<ActiveUser>>;

    // Execute the query and return the result
    return query(conn).value();
}

}  // namespace query_active_users_posts
```

<answer>```cpp
#pragma once

#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <string>
#include <vector>

namespace query_high_value_orders {

struct Customer {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> customer_id;
  std::string name;
};

struct Order {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> order_id;
  int customer_id;
  double total_amount;
  sqlgen::Timestamp<"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"> order_date;
};

struct OrderView {
  static constexpr const char* tablename = "HighValueOrderView";
  static constexpr bool is_view = true;
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> order_id;
  std::string name;
  double total_amount;
  sqlgen::Timestamp<"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"> order_date;
};

std::vector<OrderView> query_high_value_orders() {
  using namespace sqlgen::literals;
  
  auto query = sqlgen::select_from<Order, "o">("order_id"_c, "total_amount"_c, "order_date"_c, "name"_c)
               | sqlgen::inner_join<Customer, "c">("o.customer_id"_c == "c.customer_id"_c)
               | sqlgen::where("o.total_amount"_c > 1000.0)
               | sqlgen::order_by("o.total_amount"_c.desc())
               | sqlgen::to<std::vector<OrderView>>;
  
  auto conn_result = sqlgen::sqlite::connect("test_db.sqlite");
  if (!conn_result) {
    throw std::runtime_error(conn_result.error().what());
  }
  auto conn = *conn_result;
  return query(conn);
}

}  // namespace query_high_value_orders

 We'll use a transaction to group the updates.

 Code structure:

   auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::connect("test_db.sqlite");
   if (!conn) { /* handle error */ }

   auto begin_result = conn->begin_transaction();
   if (!begin_result) { /* rollback and return false */ }

   for (auto id : ids) {
        auto update_stmt = sqlgen::update<Document>(
            "is_deleted"_c.set(1),
            "deleted_at"_c.set(sqlgen::transpilation::CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
        ) | where("doc_id"_c == id);

        auto result = update_stmt(conn);
        if (!result) {
            conn->rollback();
            return false;
        }
   }

   auto commit_result = conn->commit();
   if (!commit_result) {
        conn->rollback();
        return false;
   }

   return true;

   #include <sqlgen.hpp>
   #include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>

   namespace transaction_transfer_funds {

   struct Account {
     sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> account_id;
     double balance;
   };

   bool transfer_funds(int from_account_id, int to_account_id, double amount) {
     using namespace sqlgen::literals;

     auto conn_result = sqlgen::sqlite::connect("test_db.sqlite");
     if (!conn_result) {
       return false;
     }

     auto conn = conn_result.value();

     // Begin transaction
     auto transaction = conn | sqlgen::begin_transaction;
     if (!transaction) {
       return false;
     }

     // Read the from account
     auto read_result = (sqlgen::read<std::vector<Account>> | sqlgen::where("account_id"_c == from_account_id))(conn);
     if (!read_result) {
       conn | sqlgen::rollback;
       return false;
     }

     auto accounts = read_result.value();
     if (accounts.empty() || accounts[0].balance < amount) {
       conn | sqlgen::rollback;
       return false;
     }

     // Update from account
     auto update_from = (sqlgen::update<Account>("balance"_c.set("balance"_c - amount))
                        | sqlgen::where("account_id"_c == from_account_id && "balance"_c >= amount));
     auto update_from_result = update_from(conn);
     if (!update_from_result) {
       conn | sqlgen::rollback;
       return false;
     }

     // Update to account
     auto update_to = (sqlgen::update<Account>("balance"_c.set("balance"_c + amount))
                       | sqlgen::where("account_id"_c == to_account_id));
     auto update_to_result = update_to(conn);
     if (!update_to_result) {
       conn | sqlgen::rollback;
       return false;
     }

     // Commit
     auto commit_result = conn | sqlgen::commit;
     if (!commit_result) {
       conn | sqlgen::rollback;
       return false;
     }

     return true;
   }

   }  // namespace transaction_transfer_funds
